violations.help: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

sample.html: <summary class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer list-none py-2 text-2xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-label text-muted-foreground transition-colors hover:text-foreground">
sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size (1264px by 18px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 14px instead of at least 24px.

sample.html: About
sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Target has insufficient size because it is partially obscured (smallest space is 52px by 18px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 12px instead of at least 24px.
